prompts.title: GPT-4o Model Guide
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4o — Excels at everyday tasks: Brainstorming, summarizing, emails, and creative content. Fully multimodal. Example Prompts: Summarize meeting notes into key action items. Draft a follow-up email after a project kickoff. Proof read my report. Brainstorm a launch plan in real time.

prompts.title: GPT-4.5 Model Guide
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.5 — Ideal for creative tasks: Emotional intelligence, clear communication, creativity, and a more collaborative, intuitive approach to brainstorming. Example Prompts: Create an engaging LinkedIn post about AI trends. Write a product description for a new feature launch. Develop a customer apology letter with an empathetic tone.

prompts.title: o4-mini Model Guide
prompts.prompt_text: o4-mini — Fast technical tasks: Quick STEM-related queries, programming, visual reasoning. Example Prompts: Extract key data points from a CSV file. Provide a quick summary of a scientific article. Quick-fix this Python traceback for me.

prompts.title: o4-mini-high Model Guide
prompts.prompt_text: o4-mini-high — Detailed technical tasks: Advanced coding, math, scientific explanations, thinks longer for higher accuracy. Example Prompts: Solve a complex math equation and explain the steps. Draft SQL queries for data extraction. Explain a scientific concept in layman's terms.

prompts.title: o3 Model Guide
prompts.prompt_text: o3 — Complex, or multi step tasks: Strategic planning, detailed analyses, extensive coding, advanced math, science, coding, and visual reasoning. Example Prompts: Develop a risk analysis for market expansion. Draft a business strategy outline based on competitive data. Run a multi-step analysis on this CSV — forecast next quarter and plot the trend.

prompts.title: o1 Pro Mode Guide
prompts.prompt_text: o1 pro mode — Complex reasoning: Takes a bit longer to think but delivers the accuracy you need for complex tasks. Example Prompts: Draft a detailed risk-analysis memo for an EU data-privacy rollout. Generate a multi-page research summary on emerging technologies. Create an algorithm for financial forecasting using theoretical models.

prompts.title: ChatGPT Model Comparison Table
prompts.prompt_text: Model comparison: GPT-4o (everyday workflows, creative collaboration), GPT-4.5 (writing, brainstorming, empathetic/persuasive content), o4-mini (programming, math, visual tasks), o4-mini-high (advanced technical analysis), o3 (strategy, forecasting, analytics), o1-pro (deep reasoning, regulatory, financial modeling).

prompts.title: Anti-Sycophancy System Prompt
prompts.prompt_text:
Wie du verhinderst, dass ChatGPT dir immer zustimmt:
1/ Hinterfrage meine Annahmen: Was nehme ich an, das vielleicht falsch sein könnte?
2/ Bring andere Perspektiven ein: Was würde eine kluge Person sagen, die anderer Meinung ist als ich?
3/ Zeige alternative Blickwinkel auf: Gibt es eine andere Art, diese Idee zu betrachten?
4/ Teste mein Denken: Ergibt meine Argumentation Sinn? Oder habe ich Fehler übersehen?
5/ Fokussiere dich auf Wahrheit, nicht auf Zustimmung: Wenn ich falsch liege – sag es mir. Und erkläre klar, warum.
Schließe mit diesem Satz ab: Bleib hilfreich, aber auch ehrlich. Du bist da, um mir zu helfen, klarer zu denken und bessere Ideen zu entwickeln. Wenn ich vorschnell urteile oder Dinge ohne Beweise glaube, weise mich darauf hin. Hilf mir nicht nur, bessere Antworten zu finden – sondern auch, besser zu denken.

prompts.title: Be Direct and Clear (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.1 follows instructions literally, say exactly what you want. Be specific. Vague prompts = vague answers. A single sentence firmly and unequivocally clarifying your desired behavior is almost always sufficient to steer the model on course.

prompts.title: Use Agent Mode for Tasks (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Tell it to keep going: 'Keep solving the task until it's done. Don't stop early.' Tell it to use tools: 'If you don't know something, use your tools — don't guess.' Optional: Tell it to plan: 'Think step by step before using tools and after.'

prompts.title: Ask for Better Thinking (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.1 doesn't naturally 'reason' internally. But you can prompt it to think aloud, like: 'Think step by step before you answer.' Helps with planning, decision-making, and solving complex tasks.

prompts.title: Handling Long Docs (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.1 can understand long messages well. Add instructions at the start and end of long texts. Say if it should only use the text or also use what it knows. Place instructions both above and below provided context for best results.

prompts.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompts (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Use structured reasoning: break it into steps like — 1. Understand the query, 2. Analyze each document's relevance, 3. Decide based on the most relevant info. Example: 'First, break down what the question is asking. Then list needed documents. Then summarize answers.'

prompts.title: Nail Instruction Following (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Make a clear Instructions section. Use bullet points and ordered lists. Add real examples for tricky behaviors. If something's wrong, check for: conflicting instructions, missing examples, too much or too little detail.

prompts.title: For Tools, Use API Fields (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Add tools using the proper API tools field (don't stuff them into the prompt). Name tools clearly, add short but clear descriptions. Add usage examples at the end of the prompt, not inside the description.

prompts.title: Format Tips (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Use Markdown for sections and lists. Use XML or structured formats for lots of documents. Example: <doc id=1 title='Guide'>This is the content</doc>. Avoid JSON for huge inputs, it performs worse for long content.

prompts.title: Common Pitfalls to Avoid (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Tool misuse: Model might call a tool without enough info. Fix: 'Ask for missing info before using tool.' Repetition: If you give example phrases, it might copy them word-for-word. Fix: 'Vary your responses.' Overexplaining: If it talks too much, ask for concise responses.

prompts.title: Apply Patches Like a Pro (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.1 does well generating diffs. Use the V4A format (custom diff format with clear context and changes). No need for line numbers, context is enough.

prompts.prompt_text: Compare these two samples of my writing from different times [PASTE OLDER TEXT] and [PASTE NEWER TEXT]. Identify how my style has evolved and align your responses with my current communication patterns.

prompts.title: Voice Match Mode
prompts.prompt_text: Reply to everything in my writing style: friendly, insightful, and slightly witty. Keep the tone casual but informative. Avoid sounding too robotic or overly formal.

prompts.title: My Brand, My Voice
prompts.prompt_text: From now on, write like you're representing my brand. Use a confident, authentic tone that sounds human, with short, punchy sentences and zero fluff.

prompts.title: Talk Like Me
prompts.prompt_text: Act like you've known me for years. Respond as if you're me — use my vocabulary, sentence rhythm, and the kind of phrases I use when explaining things.

prompts.title: Keep It Conversational
prompts.prompt_text: Write responses that feel like a real conversation. Use contractions (like I'm, don't), sprinkle in rhetorical questions, and end with a casual CTA when needed.

prompts.title: Don't Be a Robot
prompts.prompt_text: Avoid generic or robotic phrases like 'As an AI language model...' or 'In conclusion.' Respond like a smart, helpful friend giving real advice.

prompts.title: Punchy + Personal
prompts.prompt_text: Make your writing concise, energetic, and a little personal. Feel free to throw in a light joke or relatable example where it makes sense.

prompts.title: Use Storytelling When Possible
prompts.prompt_text: Where it fits, explain with short anecdotes, metaphors, or analogies. Make it feel like something a human would say in a real conversation.

prompts.title: Add Personality, Not Fluff
prompts.prompt_text: Write with clarity and personality. If it doesn't add value, cut it. Every sentence should sound intentional and human, not filler.

prompts.title: Social-Ready Style
prompts.prompt_text: Format replies like they're going on Instagram or X (Twitter): clean lines, short paragraphs, and hooks at the top. Emojis are okay if it suits the tone.

prompts.title: Explain Like a Creator
prompts.prompt_text: Break things down like a content creator would. Use clear steps, bold ideas, and language that feels real — not corporate or textbook.

prompts.title: Teach Me What I've Ignored
prompts.prompt_text: What critical skills, ideas, or mental models do high performers wish they'd learned earlier? Create a list of 10 I've likely missed and why each matters.

prompts.title: Collapse a Year of Wisdom Into an Hour
prompts.prompt_text: As my personal mentor, compress the most important lessons from psychology, philosophy, and real-world experience into one power-packed session.

prompts.title: Show Me What School Never Did
prompts.prompt_text: Create a personal curriculum that teaches me to think clearly, act strategically, communicate persuasively, and adapt quickly. Include real-world applications.

prompts.title: Decode How People Become Unstoppable
prompts.prompt_text: Explain the psychology, belief systems, and behaviors of someone who consistently breaks past limits, even when things get hard or boring.

prompts.title: Teach Me Like I'm Building a Legacy
prompts.prompt_text: Show me the thinking that scales impact, influence, and income. Go beyond tactics to the mindset shifts required to lead at the highest level.

prompts.title: Create Mental Models I Can't Unsee
prompts.prompt_text: Design 5 original mental models that simplify decision-making, evaluating people, learning from failure, and spotting leverage opportunities.

prompts.title: Train Me to Be Future-Proof
prompts.prompt_text: What would a version of me 10 years ahead already know? Create a training blueprint that upgrades my thinking to make me impossible to replace.

prompts.title: Procrastination Breaker
prompts.prompt_text: Analyze why I'm avoiding [SPECIFIC TASK] by examining potential causes (perfectionism, fear, boredom, etc.) and create tailored micro-commitments that bypass my resistance.

prompts.title: Focus Environment Maker
prompts.prompt_text: Create an optimal environment setup for my ADHD brain to complete [SPECIFIC TASK], including physical space organization, digital distractions management, and sensory adjustments.

prompts.title: Motivation Translator
prompts.prompt_text: I need to [COMPLETE TASK] but can't get started. Convert this into a more engaging format with immediate rewards, novelty elements, or connection to my specific interests in [TOPIC].

prompts.title: Task Initiation Trigger
prompts.prompt_text: Design a 2-minute startup ritual for beginning [DIFFICULT TASK] that bypasses my brain's initial resistance and creates enough momentum to continue working.

prompts.title: Hyperfocus Channel CEO
prompts.prompt_text: Help me harness my natural hyperfocus tendency for [IMPORTANT PROJECT] by creating optimal triggering conditions, environmental cues, and entrance rituals that direct this superpower toward meaningful work.

prompts.title: 24-Hour Business Blueprint
prompts.prompt_text: Design a workflow for my [business operation] that minimizes manual tasks and allows me to serve more customers without increasing time.

prompts.title: Instant Offer Generator
prompts.prompt_text: Act as a direct response marketer. Create a compelling offer for a [insert niche] business that solves a painful problem. Make it so good people feel stupid saying no. Include a pricing model and value stack.

prompts.title: Fast Client Acquisition
prompts.prompt_text: I want to get my first 3 clients for my [insert business type] service within 24 hours. Show me a proven outreach strategy using platforms like Facebook, LinkedIn, or Instagram to attract and close paying clients quickly.

prompts.title: Local Service Business Starter
prompts.prompt_text: I want to start a local service business in [insert city or area] in the next 24 hours. Give me 3 service ideas that are in demand, and show me how to get clients using free platforms like WhatsApp, Google Maps, or Facebook Groups.

prompts.title: Thought Ladder Reframe
prompts.prompt_text: I'm stuck overthinking [insert problem]. Use the thought ladder technique to help me reframe this negative loop into empowering thoughts that make me feel calm and in control.

prompts.title: Day-One Revenue Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: I want to make my first $100 online today. Based on my skills or interests: [insert], give me a no-fluff action plan that works even if I start from scratch. Focus only on fast-execution and proven money-making strategies.

prompts.title: Market Opportunity Finder
prompts.prompt_text: Analyze my business idea of [concept] for [target audience]. Identify market gaps, profit potential, and key competitors I should monitor.

prompts.title: Ultimate ChatGPT Prompt Handbook Promo
prompts.prompt_text: Download the Ultimate ChatGPT Prompts Ebook (Link is in Bio), let ChatGPT do all your hours of work in seconds and get ahead of your competitors!

prompts.title: Knowledge Monetizer

prompts.title: Research Synthesizer
prompts.prompt_text: Create a comprehensive research brief on [TOPIC] that synthesizes the latest findings, opposing viewpoints, and practical applications without spending days reading individual sources.

prompts.title: Presentation Maker
prompts.prompt_text: Transform this information about [TOPIC] into a complete presentation script with slide-by-slide content, speaking notes, and visual suggestions ready to drop into PowerPoint or Keynote.

prompts.title: Instant Website Builder
prompts.prompt_text: Design the complete structure and content for a high-converting website for my [BUSINESS TYPE], including homepage, about page, services, and contact sections ready to paste into a website builder.

prompts.title: Travel Itinerary Generator
prompts.prompt_text: Create a detailed day-by-day travel plan for [DESTINATION] over [DURATION] with attractions, restaurants, transportation options, and estimated costs all organized by location.

prompts.title: Email Campaign Generator
prompts.prompt_text: Create a complete 5-email sequence for [BUSINESS GOAL] that nurtures leads, builds trust, overcomes objections, and drives conversions with minimal editing needed.

prompts.title: Fitness Plan Creator
prompts.prompt_text: Design a complete [DURATION] fitness program customized for my goals of [FITNESS GOALS], available equipment of [EQUIPMENT], and time constraints of [AVAILABLE TIME].

prompts.title: Financial Planning Assist

prompts.prompt_text: So funktioniert Onboarding mit KI – direkt, automatisch, überall. Infografik mit UI-Mockup zeigt: Datenintegration, Reminder-System, Fortschritt-Tracking, Adaptive Inhalte. Effizienz, Compliance, Skalierbarkeit, Zero HR-Aufwand.
